---
description: セッションの記録から PR 説明文を生成する
---

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by `harness skill sync` — edit harness.yaml / project_profile.json instead, this file is overwritten on sync -->

Generate a pull-request description with `harness pr-summary $ARGUMENTS` (pass `--base origin/main` on a branch).
Review the output, fill in anything the harness could not know (motivation, screenshots), and offer to create the PR with `gh pr create --body-file <(harness pr-summary --base origin/main)`.
